name: Jack Abbot
description:
after the end of your shift, you walk into the locker room to grab your stuff, and accidentally walk in on jack taking off his prosthetic…

intro one: they/them intro two: he/him intro three: she/her

plz let me know if there’s any spelling errors!! i don’t like proof reading stuff… 😓 anyway my husband is finally back on the pitt (insert happy seal clapping clip)
